context: Tests whether the agent produces a Phase 7 score comparison in the required format — overall before/after with percentage delta, per-dimension breakdown, and explanation of which dimensions improved and why. Covers the specific score comparison output format prescribed by the skill.

checklist.name: Overall before/after format
checklist.description: Report includes the overall score in 'Before: X% | After: Y% (+Z%)' format (or equivalent showing both scores and the delta together in one line or heading)

checklist.name: Percentage delta shown
checklist.description: Report shows the numeric improvement delta (+31% in this case) alongside or near the before/after scores

checklist.name: Per-dimension breakdown
checklist.description: Report includes a per-dimension section covering all four dimensions from the review (Completeness, Actionability, Conciseness, Robustness)

checklist.name: Arrow notation or equivalent
checklist.description: Per-dimension entries show both old and new scores with a directional indicator (e.g. '1/3 → 3/3' or 'was 33%, now 100%')

checklist.name: Dimension change labelled
checklist.description: Each dimension entry mentions what change caused the score to improve (e.g. 'added Use when clause', 'added executable code examples')

checklist.name: Dimensions impact explained
checklist.description: Report explains which dimensions improved and why those changes matter — not just numbers

checklist.name: Correct overall scores
checklist.description: Report accurately states Before: 58%, After: 89%, delta: +31%

checklist.name: Completeness improvement noted
checklist.description: Report notes Completeness improved from 1/3 (33%) to 3/3 (100%) and attributes it to the Use when clause

checklist.name: Actionability improvement noted
checklist.description: Report notes Actionability improved from 2/3 (66%) to 3/3 (100%) and attributes it to real executable examples

checklist.name: Conciseness unchanged noted
checklist.description: Report notes that Conciseness stayed at 2/3 (66%) and did not change between before and after

checklist.name: Robustness improvement noted
checklist.description: Report notes Robustness improved from 2/3 (66%) to 3/3 (100%)
